purpose: Block promotion when required conveyor surfaces lack a worker attestation or runner-verified signature.
requiredEvidence: blocked reason when signature is missing
passConditions: trustFabricStatus is live or locally_verified for required surfaces
covered artifact path matches the promoted artifact
source artifact hashes match runner-computed hashes
signature receipt is present when external verification is required
blockConditions: model-produced attestation treated as external trust verification
release requested before required trust signatures exist
completionPosture: The gate passes only when every required promoted surface has explicit trust-signature evidence or a recorded blocked reason.
